accurate.why: Accurately describes major funding amounts, policy conditions, and restrictions including the detention bed requirement and contraceptive provisions.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all provisions are in the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies this as FY2025 DHS appropriations legislation.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Details specific policy riders, conditions, and restrictions on existing authorities.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes abortion funding exceptions and key conditions throughout.

effective_dates.why: Notes 30-day and 180-day effective dates for Coast Guard contraceptive provisions.

major_provisions_covered.why: Comprehensive coverage of funding accounts, policy riders, conditions, and rescissions.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and factual throughout; lists restrictions without advocacy.

concise.why: Extremely detailed; many granular provisions could be condensed for a summary.

correct_entities.why: All DHS components, CBP One app, TRICARE, and other entities correctly named.

correct_figures.why: $22.741 billion Disaster Relief Fund, $600 million for barriers, $300 million for technology, 50,000 beds, and rescission amounts correctly cited.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
